title: AI Service Provider Boot & Registration
interaction_flow: AiServiceProvider → Application: app->scoped(AiManager::class, fn($app) => new AiManager($app))
AiManager → Dispatcher: app->make(Dispatcher::class) [injected into each provider]
key_relationships: AiServiceProvider binds AiManager::class as scoped singleton in IoC container

AiManager uses Concerns: InteractsWithFakeAgents, InteractsWithFakeAudio, InteractsWithFakeEmbeddings, InteractsWithFakeFiles, InteractsWithFakeImages, InteractsWithFakeReranking, InteractsWithFakeStores, InteractsWithFakeTranscriptions

AiManager creates provider drivers: AnthropicProvider, AzureOpenAiProvider, CohereProvider, DeepSeekProvider, ElevenLabsProvider, GeminiProvider, GroqProvider, JinaProvider, MistralProvider, OllamaProvider, OpenAiProvider, OpenRouterProvider, VoyageAiProvider, XaiProvider
important_notes: AiManager is registered as SCOPED (per-request lifetime), not singleton
Commands registered: MakeAgentCommand, MakeAgentMiddlewareCommand, MakeToolCommand (ChatCommand is commented out)
Published assets: config (tag: ai/ai-config), stubs (tag: ai-stubs), migrations (publishesMigrations)
AiMigration refers to database migrations published via publishesMigrations(), not a PHP class
Stringable::macro('toEmbeddings') and Collection::macro('rerank') added during boot
AiManager::getInstanceConfig() falls back to ['driver' => $name] if no config found
Lab enum values are unwrapped to string in getDefaultInstance() and getInstanceConfig()
Anthropic, Gemini, OpenAI drivers receive dedicated Gateway objects; others receive only config+Dispatcher
Prism gateway imported in AiManager but no createPrismDriver method is present in analyzed code
